name: The Fool
uprightMeaning: A new journey begins. Embrace the unknown with openness and trust. The universe supports leaps of faith.
reversedMeaning: Reckless choices, ignoring warnings, naivety leading to poor decisions. Pause before leaping.

name: The Magician
uprightMeaning: You have all the tools and skills needed. Focus your will and manifest your desires through action.
reversedMeaning: Misuse of talent, manipulation, or skills going unused. Check your intentions.

name: The High Priestess
uprightMeaning: Trust your intuition. Hidden knowledge and the unconscious hold answers. Listen within.
reversedMeaning: Ignoring inner wisdom, secrets withheld from you, disconnection from intuition.

name: The Empress
uprightMeaning: Abundance, creativity, and nurturing energy. A time of growth, beauty, and sensual pleasure.
reversedMeaning: Creative blocks, neglect, overdependence. Reconnect with nature and self-care.

name: The Emperor
uprightMeaning: Build solid foundations through discipline and authority. Structure brings security and achievement.
reversedMeaning: Tyranny, rigidity, or lack of control. Boundaries are either too rigid or too loose.

name: The Hierophant
uprightMeaning: Seek wisdom from established traditions and spiritual guidance. Rituals and conventions serve a purpose.
reversedMeaning: Challenging the status quo, breaking free from convention, or rigid dogma holding you back.

name: The Lovers
uprightMeaning: Deep connection, alignment of values, and meaningful choices. Love and harmony in relationships.
reversedMeaning: Conflict in relationships, poor choices, or misaligned values creating disharmony.

name: The Chariot
uprightMeaning: Victory through willpower and determination. Take the reins and move forward with purpose.
reversedMeaning: Lack of control, conflicting forces, or aggression getting in the way of progress.

name: Strength
uprightMeaning: True power comes from compassion and inner courage. Tame your inner beast with patience and love.
reversedMeaning: Self-doubt, fear, or losing control of raw impulses. Inner work is needed.

name: The Hermit
uprightMeaning: Seek wisdom in solitude and contemplation. Turn inward for answers. A time for soul-searching.
reversedMeaning: Excessive isolation, loneliness, or refusing help from others. Rejoin the world.

name: Wheel of Fortune
uprightMeaning: The wheel turns — fortune changes. Embrace cycles and the natural flow of life. A lucky turning point.
reversedMeaning: Resisting inevitable change, bad luck, or being caught in repeating negative cycles.

name: Justice
uprightMeaning: Fairness, truth, and accountability. Decisions made now carry lasting consequences. Act with integrity.
reversedMeaning: Injustice, dishonesty, or avoiding accountability. The scales need rebalancing.

name: The Hanged Man
uprightMeaning: Voluntary surrender reveals new perspectives. A pause now leads to profound insight. Let go.
reversedMeaning: Unnecessary delay, indecision, or stalling progress. Stop sacrificing yourself for nothing.

name: Death
uprightMeaning: Transformation through endings. One chapter closes to make way for rebirth. Embrace necessary change.
reversedMeaning: Resisting inevitable endings, fear of change, or refusing to let go of what is dead.

name: Temperance
uprightMeaning: Blend opposing forces with patience and moderation. Divine alchemy creates harmony from extremes.
reversedMeaning: Imbalance, excess, or impatience disrupting flow. Find the middle path.

name: The Devil
uprightMeaning: Examine what holds you in bondage — addictions, materialism, toxic patterns. You have the power to free yourself.
reversedMeaning: Breaking free from chains, releasing limiting beliefs. Liberation is within reach.

name: The Tower
uprightMeaning: Sudden disruption tears down false foundations. Though painful, this clearing creates space for truth.
reversedMeaning: Avoiding necessary collapse, or drawing out a painful situation that needs to end.

name: The Star
uprightMeaning: Hope shines after the storm. A period of healing, renewal, and trust in the universe's guidance.
reversedMeaning: Loss of hope, despair, or disconnection from your guiding star. Reconnect with faith.

name: The Moon
uprightMeaning: Navigate through illusion and fear by trusting your intuition. Not all is as it seems in the moonlight.
reversedMeaning: Confusion lifting, repressed fears surfacing, or deception being revealed.

name: The Sun
uprightMeaning: Radiant success, joy, and vitality. The sun illuminates all, bringing clarity, confidence, and abundance.
reversedMeaning: Temporary setbacks dimming your light, or difficulty seeing the positives. The sun will return.

name: Judgement
uprightMeaning: A time of awakening and answering your higher calling. Reflect honestly and rise to your true purpose.
reversedMeaning: Ignoring the call to awaken, self-doubt blocking transformation, harsh self-judgment.

name: The World
uprightMeaning: A cycle completes in wholeness. Celebrate accomplishment and integration before the next journey begins.
reversedMeaning: Loose ends, incompletion, or taking shortcuts that prevent true closure.

name: Ace of Wands
uprightMeaning: A spark of inspired new energy. Creative potential bursts forth. Act on your inspiration now.
reversedMeaning: Creative blocks, delays, or potential not yet realized. Fan the flame.

name: Two of Wands
uprightMeaning: You stand at the threshold of a big vision. Plan your next bold move with confidence.
reversedMeaning: Fear is preventing bold action. Overplanning without execution, or a restricted vision.

name: Three of Wands
uprightMeaning: Your plans are coming to fruition. Expansion is on the horizon. Look further and broader.
reversedMeaning: Delays in expansion, setbacks, or obstacles blocking forward momentum.

name: Four of Wands
uprightMeaning: Celebrate achievements and stable foundations. A joyful gathering, milestone, or homecoming.
reversedMeaning: Conflict within home or family, unstable foundations, delayed celebration.

name: Five of Wands
uprightMeaning: Competition or conflict stirs things up. Channel this energy productively. Not all battles are worth fighting.
reversedMeaning: Avoiding conflict that needs addressing, or inner tension between competing desires.

name: Six of Wands
uprightMeaning: Victory and public recognition. You have earned your success — accept the acknowledgment with grace.
reversedMeaning: Ego getting out of hand, success not widely recognized, or a fall from previous heights.

name: Seven of Wands
uprightMeaning: Defend your position with confidence. You are being challenged, but you have the high ground.
reversedMeaning: Feeling overwhelmed, giving up too easily, or doubt eroding your position.

name: Eight of Wands
uprightMeaning: Things move swiftly now. Seize the momentum, make quick decisions, and prepare for rapid movement.
reversedMeaning: Frustrating delays, poor timing, or rushing when patience is needed.

name: Nine of Wands
uprightMeaning: You are close to the finish line — persist through the final challenge. Your resilience will carry you through.
reversedMeaning: Exhaustion, paranoia, or abandoning the goal when success is nearly within reach.

name: Ten of Wands
uprightMeaning: You carry a heavy load, but the end is near. Reassess what you can delegate or release.
reversedMeaning: Burning out from carrying too much alone. Learn to ask for help or release unnecessary burdens.

name: Page of Wands
uprightMeaning: Enthusiastic creative energy ready for exploration. An exciting message or new idea arrives.
reversedMeaning: Scattered energy, lack of follow-through, or an idea not yet ready to launch.

name: Knight of Wands
uprightMeaning: Charge forward with passionate energy. Adventure calls. Act with bold confidence.
reversedMeaning: Reckless action, impulsivity, or burning out from moving too fast.

name: Queen of Wands
uprightMeaning: Charismatic and self-assured. Your warmth and confidence draw others to you and fuel creative success.
reversedMeaning: Jealousy, selfishness, or using charm manipulatively.

name: King of Wands
uprightMeaning: A natural leader who inspires through vision and authenticity. Lead with courage and generosity.
reversedMeaning: Domineering, impulsive leadership, or setting unrealistically high expectations.

name: Ace of Cups
uprightMeaning: An overflow of emotional and creative energy. New love, deep compassion, or spiritual connection begins.
reversedMeaning: Emotional repression, difficulty opening up, or feelings of emptiness.

name: Two of Cups
uprightMeaning: A harmonious partnership blooms. Deep mutual attraction, shared values, and emotional reciprocity.
reversedMeaning: Imbalance in a relationship, communication breakdown, or separation.

name: Three of Cups
uprightMeaning: Joyful celebration with friends and community. Creative collaboration and shared happiness flourish.
reversedMeaning: Overindulgence, gossip within a group, or feeling excluded from the celebration.

name: Four of Cups
uprightMeaning: A period of introspection and disillusionment. Something new is being offered — are you too withdrawn to see it?
reversedMeaning: Emerging from apathy, new awareness of opportunities, or reengaging after withdrawal.

name: Five of Cups
uprightMeaning: Grief and loss. Focus on what remains rather than what is gone. Allow yourself to mourn, then move forward.
reversedMeaning: Beginning to accept loss, moving on, or finding peace after disappointment.

name: Six of Cups
uprightMeaning: Sweet nostalgia and the innocence of the past bring comfort. Old connections re-emerge with joy.
reversedMeaning: Stuck in idealized memories, preventing growth. Naive approach to present realities.

name: Seven of Cups
uprightMeaning: Many options and fantasies abound — but which are real? Ground your dreams in discernment.
reversedMeaning: Clarity emerging from confusion. Focusing on what truly matters after a period of illusion.

name: Eight of Cups
uprightMeaning: Walking away from what no longer fulfills. The courageous search for deeper meaning.
reversedMeaning: Avoiding difficult departure, staying in an unfulfilling situation out of fear.

name: Nine of Cups
uprightMeaning: Your wish is granted. Emotional contentment, satisfaction, and gratitude. Enjoy what you have.
reversedMeaning: Material satisfaction without inner fulfillment. Overindulgence masking deeper emptiness.

name: Ten of Cups
uprightMeaning: The fullness of emotional fulfillment — happy family, lasting harmony, and shared joy.
reversedMeaning: Disharmony in family or relationships, dysfunctional dynamics, or false happiness.

name: Page of Cups
uprightMeaning: A gentle, intuitive message arrives. Open to creative and emotional possibilities with childlike wonder.
reversedMeaning: Emotional immaturity, escapism through fantasy, or insecurity in expressing feelings.

name: Knight of Cups
uprightMeaning: A romantic, charming energy. Follow your heart toward creative and emotional pursuits.
reversedMeaning: Moodiness, unrealistic idealism, or jealousy clouding emotional judgment.

name: Queen of Cups
uprightMeaning: Deep empathy, healing intuition, and compassionate nurturing. Emotional wisdom guides you.
reversedMeaning: Emotional martyrdom, codependency, or intuition clouded by insecurity.

name: King of Cups
uprightMeaning: Master of emotional balance. Wise, compassionate leadership through empathy and calm.
reversedMeaning: Emotional manipulation, volatility beneath a calm surface, or coldness.

name: Ace of Swords
uprightMeaning: A breakthrough of clarity and truth. Cut through confusion with the sharpness of honest thought.
reversedMeaning: Confusion, mental chaos, or truth wielded cruelly without compassion.

name: Two of Swords
uprightMeaning: A stalemate — you block out information to avoid a difficult decision. The blindfold must come off.
reversedMeaning: Overwhelmed by choices, information overload, or indecision paralysis.

name: Three of Swords
uprightMeaning: Grief and heartbreak cut deeply. Allow yourself to feel the pain — healing follows honest sorrow.
reversedMeaning: Beginning to heal, forgiving past hurts, or releasing grief that has overstayed its welcome.

name: Four of Swords
uprightMeaning: A necessary pause for rest, recovery, and contemplation. Conserve your energy before the next move.
reversedMeaning: Restlessness preventing recovery, or burnout from refusing to rest.

name: Five of Swords
uprightMeaning: A hollow victory — winning through underhanded means costs more than it gains. Choose battles wisely.
reversedMeaning: Moving past a conflict, seeking reconciliation, or releasing a grudge.

name: Six of Swords
uprightMeaning: A difficult but necessary transition. Moving toward calmer waters after turbulence.
reversedMeaning: Resisting a necessary transition, or unfinished emotional business making the journey rough.

name: Seven of Swords
uprightMeaning: Strategy through cunning and deception. Are you deceiving others, or being deceived? Examine motives.
reversedMeaning: Deception coming to light, guilt, or choosing to come clean and act with integrity.

name: Eight of Swords
uprightMeaning: You feel trapped, but the prison is largely mental. You have more freedom than you believe.
reversedMeaning: Breaking free from self-imposed restrictions, reclaiming personal power.

name: Nine of Swords
uprightMeaning: Anxiety and worry torment in the dark. Most fears are mind-made. Seek support and release catastrophic thinking.
reversedMeaning: Deepening despair, shame spirals, or inner turmoil that needs professional support.

name: Ten of Swords
uprightMeaning: A painful but final ending. Rock bottom reached — the only way now is up. Dawn follows this darkest hour.
reversedMeaning: Recovery beginning, refusing to accept defeat, or avoiding a necessary ending.

name: Page of Swords
uprightMeaning: Sharp intellect and keen observation. A curious mind ready to cut through complexity.
reversedMeaning: Using sharp words deceptively, all talk with no action, or gossip.

name: Knight of Swords
uprightMeaning: Swift, decisive action driven by intellect. Charge toward your goal with focus and clarity.
reversedMeaning: Reckless verbal attacks, scattered thinking, or using intellect as a weapon.

name: Queen of Swords
uprightMeaning: Sharp intellect, honest perception, and clear communication. Wisdom through experience.
reversedMeaning: Coldness, bitterness, or cruelty disguised as honesty.

name: King of Swords
uprightMeaning: Supreme mental clarity and intellectual authority. Lead with reason, fairness, and truth.
reversedMeaning: Intellectual tyranny, manipulation through words, or cold detachment from humanity.

name: Ace of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: A new opportunity for material abundance and security. Plant seeds for tangible, lasting success.
reversedMeaning: Missed financial opportunity, poor planning, or a new beginning that lacks stability.

name: Two of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Skillfully juggling multiple responsibilities. Adaptability keeps everything in motion.
reversedMeaning: Overwhelmed by competing demands. Imbalance causing something to be dropped.

name: Three of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Skilled collaboration and mastery. Working with others toward a shared goal brings excellence.
reversedMeaning: Poor teamwork, competing egos, or misaligned visions undermining a project.

name: Four of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Financial stability through careful management. Conserving resources is wise, but beware of miserliness.
reversedMeaning: Greed, materialism, or clutching to security so tightly that new abundance is blocked.

name: Five of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Financial hardship or a sense of lack. Help is available — look up and seek support.
reversedMeaning: Beginning to recover from hardship, or spiritual poverty disguised as material wealth.

name: Six of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Generosity flows freely. Give and receive in balance. Shared prosperity uplifts all.
reversedMeaning: Imbalanced give-and-take, generosity with strings attached, or debts creating power imbalances.

name: Seven of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Your efforts are bearing fruit. Take stock of your progress and trust the long-term investment.
reversedMeaning: Impatience, poor return on investment, or doubting the value of continued effort.

name: Eight of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Dedicated, focused work develops mastery. Excellence comes from patient, diligent effort.
reversedMeaning: Perfectionism blocking completion, lack of ambition, or sloppy craftsmanship.

name: Nine of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: The fruits of self-reliance — financial independence, luxury, and refined enjoyment of life's pleasures.
reversedMeaning: Overextending financially, setbacks in independence, or confusing luxury with worth.

name: Ten of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Enduring legacy, generational wealth, and the fullness of long-term material success.
reversedMeaning: Family conflict over money, failed legacy, or short-term thinking undermining lasting security.

name: Page of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Diligent study and practical application of new skills. Ambitious dreams rooted in realistic planning.
reversedMeaning: Procrastination, missed opportunities, or laziness preventing growth.

name: Knight of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Reliable, methodical, and hardworking. Steady persistence brings tangible results.
reversedMeaning: Stuck in routine, bored, or hardworking but lacking vision.

name: Queen of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Practical nurturing and material abundance. Grounded in the earth, generous with resources and warmth.
reversedMeaning: Neglecting self-care while caring for others, financial insecurity, or smothering protectiveness.

name: King of Pentacles
uprightMeaning: Mastery of material and financial realms. Dependable, generous leadership that builds lasting security.
reversedMeaning: Greed, corruption, or stubbornness placing material wealth above all else.
